method: Layer-2 triage: corrections-diff classification + corrections-file confidence + independent vision (Claude+Argus). Provisional — NOT a lock; court of record = Jon (A4).

restored-from-SILENCE bar "sky"=F3; corrections file labels HIGH (same Cb4-Lead cadence as "shy") but it is a page-image read — and vision flags an m5(high)/m9(low) tension since BOTH are claimed F3.

claude.obs: whole note sits HIGH on the staff (~4th line F3 / top region); tentatively consistent with F3

vision.two_eye: SCATTER — claude~F3 vs argus Ab3; eyes agree the note is HIGH but differ on exact line. Uncertain.
vision.flag: m5(high) vs m9(low) BOTH claimed F3 — cross-check the pair; restored-from-silence bar

held bar "shy"=F3 — corrections file explicitly "page-image read (flagged for review)". Vision: note sits LOW on staff, SUSPECTED below F3.

claude.obs: whole note sits LOW on the staff, appears LOWER than the claimed F3 (4th line)

argus.obs: whole note on the first ledger line BELOW the bass staff; no accidental

vision.two_eye: STRONG AGREEMENT (direction) — BOTH eyes read this well BELOW the claimed F3 (4th line). The engraving F3 is a genuine pitch suspect.
vision.flag: TOP PRIORITY — two independent eyes both read LOW (below staff); engraving F3 likely too high. Page-image-read per corrections file.

restored-from-SILENCE bar: "hop"=Db4 (corrections file MODERATE, root-double) + "ing"=Bb3 (HIGH, completes the Eb triad).

claude.obs: restored-from-silence bar; cannot cleanly map 'hop' syllable to a single notehead across the context crop

argus.obs: HIGH: the notes on 'hop-ing' are QUARTER notes (solid noteheads), NOT whole/half; the only whole notes in view fall on 'same' two bars later

vision.two_eye: PITCH suspect (from-silence reconstruction); rhythm DOWNGRADED. Argus flagged quarters, but the homophonic Lead m25 is ALSO two half-notes (Lead E4:half + Eb4:half — and Lead's rhythm came from Audiveris's real page-read, only its pitch was corrected). So the half-note rhythm is structurally corroborated; Argus likely mis-segmented (it placed the whole-notes on 'same', the wrong bar).
vision.structural: Lead m25 = E4:half + Eb4:half (homophonic) corroborates Baritone 2-half rhythm. Pitch Db4 'hop' still a from-silence reconstruction.
vision.flag: PITCH still needs Jon (Db4 'hop' reconstructed); rhythm probably fine (Lead corroborates halves). 'ing'=Bb3 (row 201) is the HIGH Eb-triad completion.

rows.why: restored-from-SILENCE bar: "hop"=Db4 (corrections file MODERATE, root-double) + "ing"=Bb3 (HIGH, completes the Eb triad).

claude.obs: fermata note in the MIDDLE of the staff (~middle line D3 / 3rd space E3)

argus.obs: whole note on the first ledger line ABOVE the staff (C4); no accidental; fermata present

vision.two_eye: SCATTER (wide) — claude mid-staff (~Eb3/D3) vs argus above-staff (Cb4). Strong disagreement; genuinely uncertain.
vision.flag: cadential fermata; eyes disagree widely — needs Jon to set Eb3 vs alternatives
